title: Zones of Regulation: Spotting Triggers
summary: Learned to notice what situations move them into the 'yellow' or 'red' zone and named one calming strategy.
talking_points_home: Ask your child which 'zone' they were in today and what helped them get back to 'green'.

title: Small Group: Fractions on a Number Line
summary: Reviewed placing fractions on a number line and comparing the sizes of fractions.
talking_points_home: Have your child show you halves and fourths using a ruler or measuring cup.

title: Check-in / Check-out Coaching
summary: Met with a trusted adult to set a daily goal and review progress on staying on-task.
talking_points_home: Ask about their daily goal and celebrate one win from today.
